questions.question: What does the author say the word of God is sharper than?
questions.feedback: The word of God is living and active, sharper than any double-edged sword.

questions.question: What kind of rest does the author say remains for the people of God?
questions.feedback: There remains a Sabbath rest for the people of God.

questions.question: The author says our high priest is unable to sympathize with our weaknesses.
questions.feedback: Our high priest can sympathize with our weaknesses — he was tempted in every way yet without sin.

questions.question: The word of God judges the thoughts and _____ of the heart.
questions.feedback: The word of God judges the thoughts and intentions of the heart.

questions.question: We are told to approach the throne of _____ with confidence to receive mercy.
questions.feedback: Approach the throne of grace with confidence to receive mercy and find grace.
